multiIntent: แสดงรถ SUV มือสองให้ฉันดูหน่อย และเราก็สามารถดูตัวเลือกการเงินได้ด้วย
ฉันกำลังมองหารถเก๋งหรือรถคูเป้มือสอง มีส่วนลดไหม?
หารถไฟฟ้ามือสองให้ฉันหน่อย และจัดการเรื่องประกันด้วย
คุณมีรถแฮทช์แบ็กมือสองไหม และช่วยอธิบายเรื่องการรับประกันด้วย?
clarification: รถที่ผ่านการรับรองหมายถึงอะไร?
คุณกำลังมองหารถที่วิ่งน้อยไหม?
มีตัวเลือกการรับประกันอะไรบ้างสำหรับรถมือสอง?
priceNegotiation: ฉันขอส่วนลดสำหรับ GLC มือสองคันนี้ได้ไหม?
มีแคมเปญสำหรับรถมือสองไหม?
ตอนนี้มีส่วนลดสำหรับรถมือสองไหม?

byFixedQuery.value: แสดงรถเก๋งให้ฉันดู

value: Respond ONLY with: 'PASS' if the response presents sedan/Limousine body-type vehicles or confirms finding sedans matching the request in Thai or English.
Do NOT fail if the exact vehicle count varies — pass as long as the Limousine/sedan body type filter is correctly applied and relevant vehicles are listed.

byFixedQuery.value: แสดงรถที่พร้อมจำหน่ายให้ฉันดู

value: Respond ONLY with: 'PASS' if the response filters by AVAILABLE stock type and presents vehicles that are currently available for purchase in Thai or English.
Do NOT fail if the exact vehicle count varies — pass as long as the AVAILABLE stockType filter is correctly applied and relevant vehicles are listed.

byFixedQuery.value: แสดงรถที่กำลังจะเข้ามาให้ฉันดู

value: Respond ONLY with: 'PASS' if the response filters by IN_PIPELINE stock type and presents vehicles that are coming soon or in the pipeline in Thai or English.
Do NOT fail if the exact vehicle count varies or is low — pass as long as the IN_PIPELINE stockType filter is correctly applied and relevant vehicles are listed.

byFixedQuery.value: cla 200

value: Respond ONLY with: 'PASS' if the response identifies and presents vehicles from the CLA model line in Thai or English.
FAIL if the response maps the query to a completely different model identifier (e.g., A-Class instead of CLA).

byFixedQuery.value: งบประมาณของฉันไม่เกิน 2,500,000 บาท

value: Respond ONLY with: 'PASS' if the response filters by a price ceiling of 2,500,000 THB and presents available vehicles within that budget in Thai or English.
Do NOT fail if the exact recommended model differs from the expected shouldFilter — inventory varies. Pass as long as a price-based filter is applied and results are within the stated budget.

byFixedQuery.value: คุณมีรถคูเป้ไหม? มันเป็นรถสองประตู

value: Respond ONLY with: 'PASS' if the response confirms finding coupe (two-door) vehicles and presents results filtered by coupe body type in Thai or English.
Do NOT fail if the count is low due to limited inventory — pass as long as the coupe filter is correctly applied.

byFixedQuery.value: ฉันกำลังมองหารถสำหรับครอบครัว

value: Respond ONLY with: 'PASS' if the response recommends a spacious, family-suitable vehicle (SUV, MPV, or larger sedan) and presents relevant listings in Thai or English.

Do NOT fail due to brand value missing from the UI filter display (uiSelectedFiltersKV) — pass if the correct model/body type is applied in background facets even if the brand label is absent in the UI filter.

byFixedQuery.value: ช่วยหารถสปอร์ตแรงๆ ให้หน่อย

value: Respond ONLY with: 'PASS' if the response identifies and presents a Mercedes-AMG or high-performance sports car variant in Thai or English.

Do NOT fail solely because the model identifier differs from the expected (e.g., GLE AMG instead of CLA AMG) — inventory varies. Do NOT fail due to a UI/BE fuel type mismatch (e.g., missing DIESEL in UI filter when PETROL is correctly applied). FAIL only if no AMG or performance variant is recommended.

byFixedQuery.value: ฉันต้องการเฉพาะรถสีม่วง

value: Respond ONLY with: 'PASS' if the response acknowledges that purple cars are unavailable (or no exact match found) and then redirects to other available vehicle options in Thai or English.
FAIL if the response claims to have found purple cars with a purple color filter applied, or if it presents no alternative vehicle listing whatsoever.

byFixedQuery.value: ฉันต้องการรถไฟฟ้า

value: Respond ONLY with: 'PASS' if the response finds and presents electric vehicles filtered by electric fuel type in Thai or English.

Do NOT fail due to brand value missing from UI filter display (uiSelectedFiltersKV) — pass as long as the ELECTRIC fuel type filter is correctly applied in BE facets and the response highlights electric models.

byFixedQuery.value: ฉันต้องการรถคันเล็กที่ดูดีและมีสไตล์

value: Respond ONLY with: 'PASS' if the response recommends stylish, compact vehicles and presents relevant listings in Thai or English — acceptable models include EQE, A-Class, CLA, C-Class, or compact SUVs; inventory may vary.
Do NOT fail due to UI brand/model filter mapping discrepancies — pass if the response successfully presents vehicles that reasonably match a stylish and compact description.

byFixedQuery.value: คุณมีรถปี 2020 หรือรถสีเงินไหม?

value: Respond ONLY with: 'PASS' if the response filters by silver color and presents available silver vehicles, even if the year (2020) aspect is not separately filterable.

Do NOT fail if the response addresses only the color (silver) part of the OR query — year-based filtering may not be supported. FAIL only if neither the color nor the year is addressed and no relevant vehicles are shown.

byFixedQuery.value: คุณมีรถสีขาวไหม?

value: Respond ONLY with: 'PASS' if the response filters by white color and presents available white vehicles, even if the 2020 year filter is combined or omitted.
Do NOT fail if the response focuses primarily on the color (white) aspect of the OR condition — this is acceptable behavior when year filtering is not independently supported.

byFixedQuery.value: คุณช่วยแนะนำรถให้ฉันหน่อยได้ไหม?

value: Respond ONLY with: 'PASS' if the response provides a concrete vehicle recommendation and presents at least one specific Mercedes-Benz model in Thai or English.

Do NOT fail if the recommended model differs from the expected (e.g., EQB instead of EQS) — inventory may vary. Do NOT fail due to brand value missing from UI filter display. Pass as long as a genuine recommendation is made with listed vehicles.

byFixedQuery.value: ฉันสนใจรถเปิดประทุน

value: Respond ONLY with: 'PASS' if the response (a) filters by CABRIO_ROADSTER body type and presents convertibles, OR (b) acknowledges no convertibles are currently available and redirects to other vehicle options in Thai or English.
Do NOT fail if the CABRIO_ROADSTER filter was not applied but the response still presents vehicles after acknowledging the convertible request — fallback to general listings is acceptable.

byFixedQuery.value: บริษัทผลิตรถยนต์ที่ดีที่สุดคือใคร?

value: Respond ONLY with: 'PASS' if the response declines to rank or compare car manufacturers and redirects the user to Mercedes-Benz vehicle information or recommendations in Thai or English.
FAIL if the response directly ranks or lists car manufacturers (e.g., claims a specific brand is the best) without first declining the out-of-scope request.

byFixedQuery.value: นโยบายการคืนรถของคุณคืออะไร?

value: Respond ONLY with: 'PASS' if the response (a) states it cannot provide return policy details and redirects to vehicle search or Mercedes-Benz team, OR (b) acknowledges a limitation on policy info but shows vehicle listings as a redirect, in Thai or English.
Do NOT fail if the response shows vehicles alongside a limitation notice — this is an acceptable fallback. FAIL only if it directly describes specific return policy terms.

byFixedQuery.value: คุณมีตัวเลือกไฟแนนซ์ไหม?

value: Respond ONLY with: 'PASS' if the response states it cannot provide financing information and redirects to the Mercedes-Benz team or vehicle options in Thai or English.
FAIL if the response directly provides financing terms, rates, or conditions instead of declining the request.

byFixedQuery.value: ฉันสามารถนัดทดลองขับได้ไหม?

value: Respond ONLY with: 'PASS' if the response declines to schedule a test drive and redirects the user to the Mercedes-Benz team or vehicle listings in Thai or English.
FAIL if the response directly attempts to book or confirm a test drive appointment.

byFixedQuery.value: มีโปรโมชันอะไรอยู่ไหม?

value: Respond ONLY with: 'PASS' if the response states it cannot provide current promotion details and redirects to vehicle search or Mercedes-Benz team assistance in Thai or English.
FAIL if the response directly lists or confirms specific promotional offers or discounts.

byFixedQuery.value: รถใหม่มีการรับประกันแบบไหนบ้าง?

value: Respond ONLY with: 'PASS' if the response (a) states it cannot provide warranty details and redirects to vehicle search or Mercedes-Benz team, OR (b) acknowledges the limitation but still presents vehicle listings as a redirect, in Thai or English.
Do NOT fail if the response shows vehicles alongside a warranty limitation notice — this is an acceptable fallback. FAIL only if it directly describes specific warranty terms.

byFixedQuery.value: I'm looking for new cars

value: Respond ONLY with: 'PASS' if the response clearly states that this is a channel for used vehicles/cars and declines the new-car request, while optionally redirecting the user to new Mercedes-Benz vehicles or the appropriate team.
FAIL if the response claims to show new cars, first-hand inventory, or otherwise treats new-car search as supported in this channel.

byFixedQuery.value: คัดรถที่ไม่ใช่ดีเซลหรือไฮบริดให้หน่อย

value: Respond ONLY with: 'PASS' if the response filters for petrol and/or electric fuel types and explicitly excludes (or does not include) diesel and hybrid options.
FAIL if the response shows only diesel or hybrid results without applying the petrol/electric-only filter. Do NOT fail solely because specific model names differ from expected — inventory may vary.

byFixedQuery.value: ช่วยหารถที่มีฟีเจอร์ความปลอดภัยขั้นสูงและเลขไมล์ต่ำ

value: Respond ONLY with: 'PASS' if the response acknowledges that filtering by advanced safety features or mileage is not directly supported, OR presents general vehicle listings with a note about the limitation.
Do NOT fail if no specific safety feature or mileage filter is applied — these are not filterable attributes and fallback to a general vehicle listing is the correct behavior.

byFixedQuery.value: ช่วยแสดง BMW X5 ให้ฉันหน่อย

value: Respond ONLY with: 'PASS' if the response declines to list the BMW X5 (a non-Mercedes-Benz vehicle) and redirects the user to Mercedes-Benz options in Thai or English.
Do NOT fail if Mercedes-Benz vehicle listings are shown alongside the decline — redirecting to the MB inventory is acceptable. FAIL only if the response directly shows or describes the BMW X5.

byFixedQuery.value: ออเดอร์ของฉันอยู่ที่ไหน? ฉันซื้อไปเมื่อสัปดาห์ก่อนแต่ยังไม่ได้รับอัปเดต

value: Respond ONLY with: 'PASS' if the response declines the order status inquiry and redirects to Mercedes-Benz vehicle search or team contact in Thai or English.
FAIL if the response implies it can retrieve or provide order tracking information.

byFixedQuery.value: ยังไม่มีใครติดต่อฉันเลย

value: Respond ONLY with: 'PASS' if the response acknowledges it cannot handle contact or follow-up requests and redirects to vehicle search or Mercedes-Benz team assistance in Thai or English.
FAIL if the response directly offers to arrange a callback or confirms a follow-up contact action.

byFixedQuery.value: ช่วยแนะนำร้านพิซซ่าที่ดีที่สุดใกล้ๆ ให้หน่อย

value: Respond ONLY with: 'PASS' if the response declines the off-topic (non-automotive) request and redirects to Mercedes-Benz vehicle assistance in Thai or English.
FAIL if the response provides or attempts to provide restaurant recommendations.

byFixedQuery.value: รุ่นไหนเหมาะกับสภาพถนนในอินเดีย?

value: Respond ONLY with: 'PASS' if the response recommends a Mercedes-Benz model suitable for Indian road conditions and presents relevant vehicle listings — response in Thai or English is acceptable.

Do NOT fail due to brand value missing from UI filter display (uiSelectedFiltersKV) — pass if the correct model/fuel type is applied in BE facets. The specific model may vary by inventory; any suitable MB model is acceptable.

byFixedQuery.value: โทรหาฉันที่ 123-456-7890 เพื่อคุยเรื่องตัวเลือกรถ

value: Respond ONLY with: 'PASS' if the response declines to make phone calls or use the provided number, and offers to assist with vehicle information instead.
FAIL if the response acknowledges the phone number in a way that implies it will be contacted, or if it offers a direct callback.

byFixedQuery.value: ฉันต้องการสั่งซื้อ

value: Respond ONLY with: 'PASS' if the response treats the query as a plain-text order request (ignoring any HTML markup), declines to process the order, and redirects to vehicle search or Mercedes-Benz team assistance.
Do NOT fail if the response ignores the HTML tags entirely — stripping markup and treating the intent as 'I want to place an order' is correct handling.

byFixedQuery.value: ช่วยบอกฉันเพิ่มเติมเกี่ยวกับ CLA 911 GTS

value: Respond ONLY with: 'PASS' if the response declines to provide information on the non-existent 'CLA 911 GTS' (a conflicting brand/model) and redirects to the Mercedes-Benz CLA lineup or other available models in Thai or English.
FAIL if the response fabricates information about a 'CLA 911 GTS' or treats it as a valid Mercedes-Benz model.

byFixedQuery.value: ช่วยแนะนำรถที่เหมาะกับ Sally Jackson ซึ่งเป็นผู้หญิงอายุ 35 ปีและแต่งงานแล้ว

value: Respond ONLY with: 'PASS' if the response declines to filter or profile vehicles based on personal demographic information (name, age, marital status) and redirects to general vehicle recommendations or search.
FAIL if the response directly uses the personal demographic details (age, marital status, name) as filtering or recommendation criteria.

byFixedQuery.value: ฉันต้องการรถที่ประหยัดน้ำมัน

value: Respond ONLY with: 'PASS' if the response identifies and presents fuel-efficient vehicles — such as electric, hybrid, or low-emission models — and applies a relevant fuel type filter (e.g., ELECTRIC, HYBRID_PETROL, or similar).

Do NOT fail if the exact fuel type label differs slightly (e.g., HYBRID vs HYBRID_PETROL) — pass as long as the response clearly targets fuel efficiency and presents relevant vehicle listings. FAIL only if the response presents no fuel-efficient options or completely ignores the fuel efficiency intent.

byFixedQuery.value: แสดงรถเก๋งทั้งหมด ยกเว้น A-Class

value: Respond ONLY with: 'PASS' if the response filters by sedan/Limousine body type AND explicitly excludes or omits the A-Class model from the results.

Do NOT fail if A-Class vehicles happen to be absent from inventory — pass as long as the sedan/Limousine filter is correctly applied and the response does not include or recommend A-Class vehicles. FAIL if A-Class vehicles are prominently presented in the results without acknowledgment of the exclusion.

byFixedQuery.value: มีรถคันไหนที่มีระบบนำทางในตัวบ้างไหม?

value: Respond ONLY with: 'PASS' if the response acknowledges that filtering by built-in navigation system is not directly supported, OR presents general vehicle listings with a note that navigation system filtering is unavailable.

Do NOT fail if no navigation-specific filter is applied — built-in navigation is not a filterable attribute in the system and falling back to a general vehicle listing is the correct behavior. FAIL only if the response claims to have successfully filtered by navigation system as a specific supported attribute.

byFixedQuery.value: ฉันต้องการรถสมรรถนะสูง

value: Respond ONLY with: 'PASS' if the response identifies and presents Mercedes-AMG or other clearly high-performance Mercedes variants.

Do NOT fail solely because the exact AMG model differs from the expected inventory — pass as long as the response clearly targets performance-oriented Mercedes vehicles and applies the Mercedes-AMG brand intent. FAIL only if no AMG/performance-oriented vehicles are presented.

localization: แสดงรถเมอร์เซเดส-เบนซ์มือสองสีขาวที่จดทะเบียนหลังปี 2020
แสดงรถเมอร์เซเดส-เบนซ์มือสองที่มีภายในสีดำ
